title: iberis amara var. sabauda
intro: Iberis amara var. sabauda, also known as Rock Cress, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, Rock Cress has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rock Cress include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate sinus congestion, and soothe sore throats. Rock Cress can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote respiratory health and alleviate cold and flu symptoms.
